module.name: require-jsdoc-functions
module.description: Require JSDoc comments on all functions and require @param/@returns/@throws tags when applicable (except in test files).

scenarios.name: should allow a function with a complete JSDoc block
scenarios.given: a function preceded by a /** ... */ JSDoc comment covering its description, @param, and @returns

scenarios.name: should allow functions in test files without JSDoc
scenarios.given: a function defined inside a .test.ts file with no JSDoc

scenarios.name: should allow a parameterless function with only a description JSDoc comment
scenarios.given: a parameterless function with a /** Description */ comment

scenarios.name: should report a function with no JSDoc comment
scenarios.given: an exported function in a source file with no preceding JSDoc block

scenarios.name: should report a function with a JSDoc comment missing @param for a parameter
scenarios.given: a function with a parameter but a JSDoc block that omits @param

scenarios.name: should report a function with a JSDoc comment missing @returns for a non-void return
scenarios.given: a function that returns a value but has no @returns tag in its JSDoc
